name: Singing Hinnies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Currants or a mixture of currants and sultanas
2 tablespoons Milk, or enough to make stiff dough
recipeInstructions: These are hotcakes from the Isle of Cape Breton in Nova Scotia. Mix flour, sugar, baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt. Rub in lard (shortening) and margarine until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs. Add currants and milk gradually to form a stiff dough that can be rolled 3/4 inch thick. Cut into thick rounds and cook on a greased griddle or lightly greased electric pan set on low heat until browned. Turn the pancakes over and cook on the other side. Split and spread with butter and jam.
